infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ThenNow uses the camera to capture aligned progress photos. Images stay on your device unless you choose to share them.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ThenNow needs access to your photo library so you can add existing photos to a project.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ThenNow saves your exported progress videos to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: ThenNow needs access to your photo library so you can add existing photos to a project.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: ThenNow saves your exported progress videos to your photo library.
